merged_events.event_description: The American consulate at Lomé was raised to Embassy status upon establishment of diplomatic relations with Togo, with Jesse M. MacKnight as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on April 27, 1960, when the American consulate at Lomé was raised to Embassy status with Jesse M. MacKnight as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1960-04-27) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms the American consulate at Lomé was raised to Embassy status upon establishment of diplomatic relations.
